title: Damasus the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Damasus, bishop of Rome, had a fine talent for making verses and published many brief works in heroic metre.
He died in the reign of the Emperor Theodosius at the age of almost eighty.
